description.zh: 通用编码 agent · 接 iori 玩法骨架 / suzu 体验流程 / kotone 剧情大纲,产出可运行的 TS/React/Go/Python 代码。偏好 claude-code CLI,支持多 instance 并行写不同子包。
description.en: Generic coding agent. Takes iori's gameplay pillars, suzu's UX flows, kotone's narrative outlines and turns them into runnable TS/React/Go/Python. Prefers claude-code CLI; multi-instance for parallel package work.

description.zh: 把一份带验收条件的 spec/任务卡落成可运行代码 + ≥5 case 单测
description.en: Turn an actionable spec into runnable code with ≥5 unit tests
